zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Foljambe Esq.於大約1443年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾沃爾頓時，他的父親Thomas Foljambe43歲，母親Jane Ashton30歲。他於1463年與Benedicta Vernon在英國英格蘭德比夏爾沃爾頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1504年8月在英國德比夏爾斯特費爾德享年62歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾斯特費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Foljambe Esq.于大约1443年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾沃爾頓时，他的父亲Thomas Foljambe43岁，母亲Jane Ashton30岁。他于1463年与Benedicta Vernon在英国英格兰德比夏爾沃爾頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1504年8月在英国德比夏爾斯特費爾德享年62岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾斯特費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Foljambe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French fol ‘foolish, silly’ + jambe ‘leg’, probably a nickname for a lame person, someone with a maimed or crooked leg; compare Belgian . In Old French fol could be used of something useless or of little value, e.g. farine folle ‘mill dust’.

variants.name: Fulljames
meanings: English: variant of Foljambe with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Belgian
meanings: Norman, English, Scottish: nickname from Anglo-Norman French bele jambe ‘fine leg’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Foljambe Esq. was born about 1443, in Walton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Foljambe, was 43 and his mother, Jane Ashton, was 30. He married Benedicta Vernon in 1463, in Walton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. He died in August 1504, in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Foljambe Esq. est né environ 1443, à Walton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Foljambe, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Jane Ashton, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Benedicta Vernon en 1463, à Walton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en août 1504, à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Foljambe Esq. um 1443 in Walton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Foljambe 43 und seine Mutter Jane Ashton 30. Er hat 1463 in Walton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Benedicta Vernon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb im August 1504 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England und wurde in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Foljambe Esq. è nato il circa 1443 nel Walton, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Foljambe, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Jane Ashton, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Benedicta Vernon nel 1463, nel Walton, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel agosto 1504, nel Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Foljambe Esq.が約1443年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアワルトンで生まれた時，父Thomas Foljambeは43歳，母Jane Ashtonは30歳であった。1463年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアワルトンでBenedicta Vernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1504年8月にイギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドで62歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Foljambe Esq.(이)가 대략 1443년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 월턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Foljambe(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Ashton(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1463년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 월턴에서 Benedicta Vernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1504년 8월 영국 더비실르 체스터필드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 체스터필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Foljambe Esq. nasceu aproximadamente 1443, em Walton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Foljambe, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Jane Ashton, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Benedicta Vernon em 1463, em Walton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em agosto de 1504, em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Foljambe Esq. родился около 1443 г. в местности валтон, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Foljambe было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Ashton, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Benedicta Vernon в 1463 г. в местности валтон, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер август 1504 г. в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Foljambe Esq. nació aproximadamente 1443, en Walton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Foljambe, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Jane Ashton, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Benedicta Vernon en 1463, en Walton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en agosto de 1504, en Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
